tasks.text: Assess performance following athletic competition, identifying strengths and weaknesses and making adjustments to improve future performance.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Maintain equipment used in a particular sport.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Attend scheduled practice or training sessions.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Maintain optimum physical fitness levels by training regularly, following nutrition plans, or consulting with health professionals.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Participate in athletic events or competitive sports, according to established rules and regulations.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Exercise or practice under the direction of athletic trainers or professional coaches to develop skills, improve physical condition, or prepare for competitions.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Receive instructions from coaches or other sports staff prior to events and discuss performance afterwards.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Represent teams or professional sports clubs, performing such activities as meeting with members of the media, making speeches, or participating in charity events.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Lead teams by serving as captain.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.
